title: LF11FIAE Skillset
subtitle: Implement functionality in applications
intro: LF11a combines sound software design with implementable functionality in real applications.
The focus is on modularization, data structures, algorithms, tests, and traceable documentation.

subsections.title: Plan modular software components
items: Apply modularization principles to a project objective
Describe software components with UML
Choose design patterns for a specific use case
Take clean-code principles into account in the component structure
Keep dependencies between modules transparent

subsections.title: Plan and choose data structures according to needs
items: Classify fundamental data structures professionally
Choose suitable data structures based on access patterns
Weigh memory and runtime effects when choosing
Plan data structures for maintainable components
Recognize wrong data-structure decisions early

subsections.title: Use data structures in Python and Java
items: Use Python data structures for typical tasks
Use Java data structures for stable components
Distinguish lists, sets, and associative structures consciously
Use language-specific strengths in a sensible way
Justify the data-structure choice in both languages

subsections.title: Implement algorithms, recursion, and sorting
items: Design algorithms for a problem step by step
Implement recursive solutions correctly
Compare sorting methods and choose them appropriately
Estimate runtime effects for different solutions
Cover edge cases and termination conditions robustly

subsections.title: Apply compression, encryption, and hashing
items: Classify compression methods according to purpose
Distinguish encryption for transport and storage
Use hash functions for integrity and verification
Recognize security limits and false assumptions
Justify security-related technical decisions in a traceable way

subsections.title: Implement JSON, web services, and database integration
items: Import and export JSON safely
Integrate web-service calls into components in a structured way
Implement error handling for external services
Connect functionality with database access consistently
Design data exchange to be robust and maintainable

subsections.title: Test software components
items: Choose suitable test methods depending on goal and risk
Derive precise test cases from requirements
Structure and maintain automated unit tests
Prioritize test coverage sensibly
Document findings in a reproducible way

subsections.title: Document components and interfaces
items: Describe interfaces with inputs and outputs clearly
Document preconditions and error cases
Maintain change history for the team and operations
Provide usage notes for other teams
Align documentation with maintainability and traceability
